messages.text: anyone know why the Athena sync is timing out for client Sunrise Medical?
check ehr_timeout_seconds in their config, its probably still set to 10
also check if they hit the 1000 req/min rate limit, Athena is aggressive about that
timeout was the issue, bumped ehr_timeout_seconds to 30 and its working now. thanks!
heads up - Epic sandbox is down for maintenance until 3pm EST today
thanks for the heads up sarah
ECW client Westside Clinic is getting HL7 parsing errors on their ADT messages, anyone seen this before?
yes - check the Mirth Connect channel logs, ECW sometimes sends non-UTF8 characters in the patient name field
found it, there was a special character in the last name field. added a sanitization step in the channel transform
Veradigm client Lakewood Health is getting API size limit errors on their appointment sync
enable chunked response handling in VeradigmClient.java - there is a flag for it in the config
got it working, the response payload was exceeding the default limit. chunked handling fixed it
onboarding a new Epic client next week - Northgate Hospital. anyone have the checklist handy?
its in Confluence under the onboarding guide. make sure to run the constants sync first before triggering the appointment sync
constants sync came back empty - any idea why?
usually an auth token issue. verify the API credentials in the secrets config for Northgate
that was it! credentials were set to the sandbox values. switched to prod creds and constants sync completed successfully
reminder: do not flip appointment_sync_enabled to true in production without implementation lead sign off
noted, thanks sarah
provider IDs are not mapping correctly for Northgate. seeing nulls in the provider_map table
NPI mismatch most likely. cross reference their provider roster from Epic against what we have in provider_map
confirmed NPI mismatch for 3 providers. fixed the mapping manually and re-ran the constants sync. all good now
